name: Streusel Apple Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quick oats or old-fashioned oats (uncooked)
1/3 cup Quick oats or old-fashioned oats (uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 425°F.
2 Grease the bottoms of 12 medium muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups.
3 In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, oats, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
4 In another bowl, mix milk, melted margarine/butter, egg, and vanilla. Stir in the finely chopped apple until just combined.
5 Pour batter into prepared muffin cups, filling them 3/4 full.
6 For topping, combine remaining dry ingredients in a small bowl. Cut in margarine until crumbly. Sprinkle evenly over each muffin.
7 Bake for 18-20 minutes or until the tops are deep golden brown and the muffins are cooked through.
8 Serve warm.
